# Developer Integration Guide — Talky.ai
# How to apply all generated files to the repository

This guide tells you EXACTLY which file goes WHERE in the repo.
Every file  match the existing folder structure — 
you are not creating new folders in most cases, just replacing files.

Think of it like this:
  outputs/fixes/docker-compose.yml  →  copy to repo root  →  docker-compose.yml
  outputs/upgrades/backend/app/core/telemetry.py  →  copy to  backend/app/core/telemetry.py

---

## STEP 1 — CI/CD workflows (GitHub Actions)
# These replace your existing .github/workflows/ files

FROM (outputs folder)                        TO (your repo)
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outputs/fixes/.github/workflows/ci.yml    →  .github/workflows/ci.yml
outputs/fixes/.github/workflows/deploy.yml →  .github/workflows/deploy.yml

Git commands:
  cp outputs/fixes/.github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/ci.yml
  cp outputs/fixes/.github/workflows/deploy.yml .github/workflows/deploy.yml


---

## STEP 2 — Root config files
# These go in the ROOT of your repo (same level as docker-compose.yml)

FROM (outputs folder)               TO (your repo root)
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outputs/fixes/docker-compose.yml  →  docker-compose.yml      ← REPLACES existing
outputs/fixes/.env.docker         →  .env.docker             ← REPLACES existing
outputs/fixes/.gitignore          →  .gitignore              ← REPLACES existing

Git commands:
  cp outputs/fixes/docker-compose.yml docker-compose.yml
  cp outputs/fixes/.env.docker .env.docker
  cp outputs/fixes/.gitignore .gitignore


---

## STEP 3 — Scripts (new folder)
# These are brand new scripts — create the folder and copy them in

FROM (outputs folder)                      TO (your repo)
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outputs/fixes/scripts/firewall-setup.sh  →  scripts/firewall-setup.sh
outputs/fixes/scripts/generate-secrets.sh →  scripts/generate-secrets.sh
outputs/fixes/scripts/gen-sip-certs.sh   →  scripts/gen-sip-certs.sh

Git commands:
  mkdir -p scripts
  cp outputs/fixes/scripts/firewall-setup.sh scripts/
  cp outputs/fixes/scripts/generate-secrets.sh scripts/
  cp outputs/fixes/scripts/gen-sip-certs.sh scripts/
  chmod +x scripts/*.sh


---

## STEP 4 — Telephony configs
# These go inside the telephony/ folder of your repo

FROM (outputs folder)                                           TO (your repo)
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outputs/fixes/telephony/rtpengine/conf/rtpengine.conf        →  telephony/rtpengine/conf/rtpengine.conf
outputs/fixes/telephony/opensips/conf/tls.cfg                →  telephony/opensips/conf/tls.cfg
outputs/fixes/telephony/kamailio/conf/tls.cfg                →  telephony/kamailio/conf/tls.cfg
outputs/fixes/telephony/observability/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml → telephony/observability/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml

Git commands:
  cp outputs/fixes/telephony/rtpengine/conf/rtpengine.conf telephony/rtpengine/conf/rtpengine.conf
  cp outputs/fixes/telephony/opensips/conf/tls.cfg telephony/opensips/conf/tls.cfg
  cp outputs/fixes/telephony/kamailio/conf/tls.cfg telephony/kamailio/conf/tls.cfg
  cp outputs/fixes/telephony/observability/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml telephony/observability/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml


---

## STEP 5 — Backend: Alembic (database migrations)
# Alembic goes inside the backend/ folder

FROM (outputs folder)                              TO (your repo)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outputs/upgrades/backend/alembic.ini             →  backend/alembic.ini
outputs/upgrades/backend/alembic/env.py          →  backend/alembic/env.py
outputs/upgrades/backend/alembic/script.py.mako  →  backend/alembic/script.py.mako
outputs/upgrades/backend/alembic/versions/0001_baseline.py → backend/alembic/versions/0001_baseline.py

Git commands:
  cp outputs/upgrades/backend/alembic.ini backend/alembic.ini
  mkdir -p backend/alembic/versions
  cp outputs/upgrades/backend/alembic/env.py backend/alembic/env.py
  cp outputs/upgrades/backend/alembic/script.py.mako backend/alembic/script.py.mako
  cp outputs/upgrades/backend/alembic/versions/0001_baseline.py backend/alembic/versions/0001_baseline.py

After copying, run this on your server (ONE TIME ONLY):
  cd backend
  export DATABASE_URL="postgresql://youruser:yourpassword@localhost:5432/talkyai"
  alembic stamp 0001_baseline
  # This tells Alembic "the DB already exists, start tracking from here"


---

## STEP 6 — Backend: app/core/ files
# These go inside backend/app/core/

FROM (outputs folder)                          TO (your repo)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outputs/upgrades/backend/app/core/telemetry.py →  backend/app/core/telemetry.py  ← NEW file
outputs/upgrades/backend/app/core/kms.py       →  backend/app/core/kms.py        ← NEW file
outputs/continue/backend/app/core/container.py →  backend/app/core/container.py  ← REPLACES existing

Git commands:
  cp outputs/upgrades/backend/app/core/telemetry.py backend/app/core/telemetry.py
  cp outputs/upgrades/backend/app/core/kms.py backend/app/core/kms.py
  cp outputs/continue/backend/app/core/container.py backend/app/core/container.py


---

## STEP 7 — Backend: app/main.py
# This replaces your existing main.py

FROM (outputs folder)                TO (your repo)
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outputs/upgrades/backend/app/main.py → backend/app/main.py  ← REPLACES existing

Git command:
  cp outputs/upgrades/backend/app/main.py backend/app/main.py


---

## STEP 8 — Backend: app/domain/services/ files
# These go inside backend/app/domain/services/

FROM (outputs folder)                                              TO (your repo)
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outputs/upgrades/backend/app/domain/services/recording_service.py → backend/app/domain/services/recording_service.py    ← REPLACES
outputs/continue/backend/app/domain/services/voice_pipeline_service.py → backend/app/domain/services/voice_pipeline_service.py ← REPLACES
outputs/core_prompts/backend/app/domain/services/core_prompts.py  → backend/app/domain/services/core_prompts.py          ← NEW
outputs/core_prompts/backend/app/domain/services/prompt_manager.py → backend/app/domain/services/prompt_manager.py       ← REPLACES
outputs/dental/backend/app/domain/services/dental_workflow.py     → backend/app/domain/services/dental_workflow.py       ← NEW
outputs/dental/backend/app/domain/services/streaming_pipeline.py  → backend/app/domain/services/streaming_pipeline.py   ← NEW

Git commands:
  cp outputs/upgrades/backend/app/domain/services/recording_service.py backend/app/domain/services/recording_service.py
  cp outputs/continue/backend/app/domain/services/voice_pipeline_service.py backend/app/domain/services/voice_pipeline_service.py
  cp outputs/core_prompts/backend/app/domain/services/core_prompts.py backend/app/domain/services/core_prompts.py
  cp outputs/core_prompts/backend/app/domain/services/prompt_manager.py backend/app/domain/services/prompt_manager.py
  cp outputs/dental/backend/app/domain/services/dental_workflow.py backend/app/domain/services/dental_workflow.py
  cp outputs/dental/backend/app/domain/services/streaming_pipeline.py backend/app/domain/services/streaming_pipeline.py


---

## STEP 9 — Backend: API endpoint (recordings)
# This replaces the existing recordings endpoint

FROM (outputs folder)                                        TO (your repo)
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outputs/upgrades/backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/recordings.py → backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/recordings.py ← REPLACES

Git command:
  cp outputs/upgrades/backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/recordings.py backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/recordings.py


---

## STEP 10 — Backend: config/providers.yaml (latency fixes)
# This replaces your providers.yaml — 9 latency optimisations inside

FROM (outputs folder)                    TO (your repo)
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outputs/dental/backend/config/providers.yaml → backend/config/providers.yaml ← REPLACES

Git command:
  cp outputs/dental/backend/config/providers.yaml backend/config/providers.yaml


---

## STEP 11 — Backend: requirements.txt (new dependencies)
# This replaces requirements.txt — adds alembic, boto3, opentelemetry

FROM (outputs folder)                       TO (your repo)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outputs/upgrades/backend/requirements.txt → backend/requirements.txt ← REPLACES

Git command:
  cp outputs/upgrades/backend/requirements.txt backend/requirements.txt

After copying, install new dependencies:
  cd backend
  pip install -r requirements.txt


---

## STEP 12 — Tests
# New test folders and files

FROM (outputs folder)                                          TO (your repo)
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outputs/dental/backend/tests/dental/conftest.py             → backend/tests/dental/conftest.py
outputs/dental/backend/tests/dental/test_dental_workflow.py → backend/tests/dental/test_dental_workflow.py
outputs/core_prompts/backend/tests/core_prompts/test_core_prompts.py → backend/tests/core_prompts/test_core_prompts.py

Git commands:
  mkdir -p backend/tests/dental backend/tests/core_prompts
  cp outputs/dental/backend/tests/dental/conftest.py backend/tests/dental/conftest.py
  cp outputs/dental/backend/tests/dental/test_dental_workflow.py backend/tests/dental/test_dental_workflow.py
  cp outputs/core_prompts/backend/tests/core_prompts/test_core_prompts.py backend/tests/core_prompts/test_core_prompts.py


---

## STEP 13 — Nginx (server only — NOT in repo)
# These go on the SERVER, not in the git repo

THESE FILES DO NOT GO IN GIT. They go directly on your Hetzner server.

On your server:
  sudo cp outputs/fixes/nginx/talky.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/talky.conf
  sudo ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/talky.conf /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/talky.conf
  # Also add the rate limit lines from nginx_http_block_addition.conf
  # into your /etc/nginx/nginx.conf inside the http {} block
  sudo nginx -t
  sudo systemctl reload nginx


---

## STEP 14 — Secrets manager KMS patch (manual edit)
# This one cannot be a simple file copy — it's a patch to existing code
# File: outputs/upgrades/backend/app/domain/services/secrets_manager_kms_patch.py
# Open that file and read it — it tells you exactly what to change

The patch file has 4 changes to make in backend/app/domain/services/secrets_manager.py:
  1. Add import at top: from app.core.kms import get_kms_backend, KMSBackend
  2. Replace __init__ method (shown in patch file)
  3. Replace _encrypt_dek method with _wrap_dek
  4. Replace _decrypt_dek method with _unwrap_dek

OR run these 3 sed commands to do it automatically:
  cd backend
  sed -i 's/encrypted_dek = self\._encrypt_dek(dek)/encrypted_dek = await self._wrap_dek(dek)/g' app/domain/services/secrets_manager.py
  sed -i 's/dek = self\._decrypt_dek(encrypted_dek)/dek = await self._unwrap_dek(encrypted_dek)/g' app/domain/services/secrets_manager.py
  sed -i 's/dek = self\._decrypt_dek(row\["encrypted_dek"\])/dek = await self._unwrap_dek(row["encrypted_dek"])/g' app/domain/services/secrets_manager.py
  # Then manually add the import and replace __init__ as shown in the patch file


---

## COMPLETE COPY — run all at once from your repo root

# (Copy this entire block and run it from the root of your repo)

# Step 1 — CI/CD
cp outputs/fixes/.github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/ci.yml
cp outputs/fixes/.github/workflows/deploy.yml .github/workflows/deploy.yml

# Step 2 — Root files
cp outputs/fixes/docker-compose.yml docker-compose.yml
cp outputs/fixes/.env.docker .env.docker
cp outputs/fixes/.gitignore .gitignore

# Step 3 — Scripts
mkdir -p scripts
cp outputs/fixes/scripts/firewall-setup.sh scripts/
cp outputs/fixes/scripts/generate-secrets.sh scripts/
cp outputs/fixes/scripts/gen-sip-certs.sh scripts/
chmod +x scripts/*.sh

# Step 4 — Telephony
cp outputs/fixes/telephony/rtpengine/conf/rtpengine.conf telephony/rtpengine/conf/rtpengine.conf
cp outputs/fixes/telephony/opensips/conf/tls.cfg telephony/opensips/conf/tls.cfg
cp outputs/fixes/telephony/kamailio/conf/tls.cfg telephony/kamailio/conf/tls.cfg
cp outputs/fixes/telephony/observability/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml telephony/observability/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml

# Step 5 — Alembic
cp outputs/upgrades/backend/alembic.ini backend/alembic.ini
mkdir -p backend/alembic/versions
cp outputs/upgrades/backend/alembic/env.py backend/alembic/env.py
cp outputs/upgrades/backend/alembic/script.py.mako backend/alembic/script.py.mako
cp outputs/upgrades/backend/alembic/versions/0001_baseline.py backend/alembic/versions/0001_baseline.py

# Step 6 — Core files
cp outputs/upgrades/backend/app/core/telemetry.py backend/app/core/telemetry.py
cp outputs/upgrades/backend/app/core/kms.py backend/app/core/kms.py
cp outputs/continue/backend/app/core/container.py backend/app/core/container.py

# Step 7 — main.py
cp outputs/upgrades/backend/app/main.py backend/app/main.py

# Step 8 — Domain services
cp outputs/upgrades/backend/app/domain/services/recording_service.py backend/app/domain/services/recording_service.py
cp outputs/continue/backend/app/domain/services/voice_pipeline_service.py backend/app/domain/services/voice_pipeline_service.py
cp outputs/core_prompts/backend/app/domain/services/core_prompts.py backend/app/domain/services/core_prompts.py
cp outputs/core_prompts/backend/app/domain/services/prompt_manager.py backend/app/domain/services/prompt_manager.py
cp outputs/dental/backend/app/domain/services/dental_workflow.py backend/app/domain/services/dental_workflow.py
cp outputs/dental/backend/app/domain/services/streaming_pipeline.py backend/app/domain/services/streaming_pipeline.py

# Step 9 — API endpoint
cp outputs/upgrades/backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/recordings.py backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/recordings.py

# Step 10 — providers.yaml
cp outputs/dental/backend/config/providers.yaml backend/config/providers.yaml

# Step 11 — requirements.txt
cp outputs/upgrades/backend/requirements.txt backend/requirements.txt

# Step 12 — Tests
mkdir -p backend/tests/dental backend/tests/core_prompts
cp outputs/dental/backend/tests/dental/conftest.py backend/tests/dental/conftest.py
cp outputs/dental/backend/tests/dental/test_dental_workflow.py backend/tests/dental/test_dental_workflow.py
cp outputs/core_prompts/backend/tests/core_prompts/test_core_prompts.py backend/tests/core_prompts/test_core_prompts.py

echo "All files copied. Now run: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt"


---

## AFTER COPYING — verify it works

cd backend
pip install -r requirements.txt
python -c "from app.core.telemetry import get_tracer; print('OTel OK')"
python -c "from app.core.kms import get_kms_backend; print('KMS OK')"
python -c "from app.domain.services.core_prompts import CorePromptEngine; print('Core prompts OK')"
python -c "from app.domain.services.streaming_pipeline import stream_llm_to_tts; print('Streaming pipeline OK')"
python -c "from app.domain.services.dental_workflow import build_dental_agent_config; print('Dental workflow OK')"
pytest tests/core_prompts/ -v
pytest tests/dental/ -v


---

## WHAT EACH FILE ACTUALLY WORKS

ci.yml              → Adds secret scanning, Trivy image scan, removes || true so tests actually fail
deploy.yml          → SHA-based image deploys + rollback job
docker-compose.yml  → Removes hardcoded passwords, locks ports, adds Redis auth
.env.docker         → Template for secrets — developer fills in real values
.gitignore          → Proper ignore file (was only 2 lines before)
scripts/            → Helper scripts for server setup
rtpengine.conf      → Fixes CVE-2025-53399 (CVSS 9.3) — call hijacking vulnerability
tls.cfg (×2)        → Enables TLS cert validation in OpenSIPS and Kamailio
alertmanager.yml    → Wires Slack alerts so you actually know when something breaks
alembic/            → Database migration framework — replaces dangerous init.sql re-runs
telemetry.py        → OpenTelemetry tracing — see exactly how long each call stage takes
kms.py              → Proper encryption for secrets using AES-256-GCM (or AWS KMS)
container.py        → Fixes Redis not connecting because password wasn't being passed
main.py             → Starts OTel before anything else + minor log level fix
recording_service.py → Saves call recordings to S3/Hetzner storage instead of local disk
voice_pipeline_service.py → Adds OTel spans to every STT/LLM/TTS stage of voice calls
core_prompts.py     → The 3 master prompts (appointment/support/order) that work for any industry
prompt_manager.py   → Routes any campaign to the right core prompt automatically
dental_workflow.py  → Full dental receptionist agent config + 6 test scenarios
streaming_pipeline.py → Pipes LLM tokens directly to TTS sentence-by-sentence (saves ~120ms)
recordings.py       → Updated API endpoint to serve S3 presigned URLs for audio playback
providers.yaml      → 9 latency fixes: EOT timeout 800ms, Cartesia active, llama-3.1-8b-instant
requirements.txt    → Adds: alembic, boto3, opentelemetry packages
test_dental_workflow.py → Full test suite for dental scenarios + latency benchmarks
test_core_prompts.py → Tests all 3 prompts work for 18 different industries
